steps.title: Target the claim
steps.content: The example must show that a peaking hydroelectric plant can generate more megawatt hours per year than some run-of-river plants. The relevant data must compare plant type with annual generation, because generator count alone would not prove that claim.

steps.title: Use annual generation
steps.content: Choice B uses number of generators instead of power generated. Choice C compares two run-of-river plants, and Choice D reverses the relationship the claim needs. The data point showing J. Woodruff's annual generation above the run-of-river plants directly supports the example. The answer is A.
